description: JBoss Log Manager is an extension of Java Util Logging that supplies a replacement LogManager implementation for applications and containers. It provides JBoss logging infrastructure such as log contexts, loggers, handlers, formatters, filters, and property-based configuration support.

JBoss Log Manager is an implementation of java.util.logging.LogManager for applications and containers that need a replacement for the JDK log manager. It provides JBoss-specific logging infrastructure, including logger, handler, formatter, and configuration support.
